data.title: 国际服圣诞礼物「Special Remedial Knights Gift」
data.summary: [Special Remedial Knights Gift] Merry Christmas, Sensei! The Remedial Knights prepared a special gif
data.body:
[Special Remedial Knights Gift]

Merry Christmas, Sensei!

The Remedial Knights prepared a special gift this year.
Log in now to find out what it is!

🗓️Event Schedule: 12/21 (Thu) 3:00 AM – 12/28 (Thu) 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2448531
